summary: A relaxed 3-day Jaipur plan focused on culture and food with light travel between Old City stops.

sources.title: Jaipur — Wikivoyage
sources.snippet: The Pink City is known for forts, palaces, and bazaars in and around the Old City.

sources.title: OpenStreetMap — Jaipur
sources.snippet: POI coordinates and ids sourced from OpenStreetMap.

stops.name: Hawa Mahal
stops.reason: Iconic palace facade and a gentle start near other Old City sights.

citations.title: Jaipur — See — Wikivoyage
citations.snippet: Hawa Mahal is a landmark palace of winds in the Old City.

stops.name: City Palace
stops.reason: Core royal complex; keep afternoon unhurried for a relaxed pace.

citations.title: Jaipur — See — Wikivoyage
citations.snippet: City Palace remains a major museum and palace complex in central Jaipur.

stops.name: Laxmi Misthan Bhandar (LMB)
stops.reason: Well-known local sweets and snacks stop after sightseeing.

citations.title: Jaipur — Eat — Wikivoyage
citations.snippet: Jaipur is known for Rajasthani sweets and snack houses in the Old City.

stops.name: Amber Fort
stops.reason: Major fort visit scheduled in cooler morning hours; single big stop for relaxed pace.

citations.title: Jaipur — See — Wikivoyage
citations.snippet: Amber (Amer) Fort is a large hill fort north of the city.

stops.name: Albert Hall Museum
stops.reason: Indoor culture stop after travel back from Amber; good buffer if weather turns.

citations.title: Jaipur — See — Wikivoyage
citations.snippet: Albert Hall Museum is a major museum in Ram Niwas Garden.

stops.name: Jal Mahal (viewpoint)
stops.reason: Short photo stop on the return toward the city; low effort between fort and museum.

citations.title: Jaipur — See — Wikivoyage
citations.snippet: Jal Mahal sits in Man Sagar Lake and is typically viewed from the shore.

stops.uncertainty: Interior access can be restricted; plan assumes exterior viewpoint only.

days.theme: Markets, temples, and a calm close

stops.name: Birla Mandir
stops.reason: Calm cultural morning stop with modest duration for a relaxed final day.

citations.title: Jaipur — See — Wikivoyage
citations.snippet: Birla Mandir is a modern marble temple often visited by travelers.

stops.name: Bapu Bazaar
stops.reason: Shopping and snacks without long transfers; matches food + culture interests.

citations.title: Jaipur — Buy — Wikivoyage
citations.snippet: Bapu Bazaar is a popular market for textiles and handicrafts.

evening.notes: Relax / free evening — no food/park/market stop scheduled.
